species: Here, we have examined the role of CCAR-1 in genome-wide alternative splicing in Caenorhabditis elegans
disease_state: Our previous work demonstrates that the knockdown of ccar-1 by RNAi upregulates proteostasis, in a sir-2.1 dependent manner, by decreasing polyglutamine aggregate formation in a C. elegans Huntington’s disease model.
sample_source: The following strains were used in the study: Wild-type Bristol N2, VC1029 ccar-1 (gk433) IV, MT16492 uaf-1(n4588) III...
age: RNA was extracted from wildtype N2 and CCAR-1 null (SDW040) worms on day 1 of adulthood...
strain: The CCAR-1 deletion mutant strain VC1029 ccar-1 (gk433) IV, which contains a deletion of the first three exons of the ccar-1 gene resulting in a null mutant, was outcrossed three times with our laboratory wildtype N2 strain to create strain SDW040.
